原句The process is known as “decimation” by a factor of M.
中文译读可译为“这种对象/现象称为……”。本句是在给 一个术语 下定义；后文遇到该词时要回到这个定义。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Despite the origins of the term (decem is Latin for ten), M can have any integer value, provided that the output data rate is more than twice the signal bandwidth.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 带宽 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释带宽：满足指定增益/误差条件的频率范围。。
原句Decimation does not cause any loss of information (see Figure 6.89B).
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句If we simply use oversampling to improve re solution, we must oversample by a factor of 22N to obtain an N-bit increase in resolution.
中文译读可译为“必须/需要……”。这是约束条件，通常关系到 安全工作范围、精度或稳定性。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句The Σ-Δ converter does not need such a high oversampling ratio because it not only limits the signal passband, but also shapes the quantization noise so that most of it falls outside this passband as shown in Figure 6.89C.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 噪声，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句If we take a 1-bit ADC (gener ally known as a comparator), drive it with the output of an integrator, and feed the integrator with an input signal summed with the output of a 1-bit DAC fed from the ADC output , we have a first-order Σ-Δ modulator as shown in Figure 6.90.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 比较器 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释比较器：判断两个输入大小并输出逻辑电平；不能简单把普通运放当高速比较器。。
原句Add a digital low-pass filter (LPF) and decimator at the digital output, and we have a Σ-Δ ADC—the Σ-Δ modulator shapes the quanti zation noise so that it lies above the passband of the digita l output filter, and the ENOB is therefore much larger than would otherwise be expected from the oversampling ratio. fs 2 fs Kfs 2 Kfs 2 Kfs KfsKfs 2 fs 2 fs 2 fs 2 DIGITAL FILTER REMOVED NOISE REMOVED NOISE QUANTIZATION NOISE = q / 12 q = 1 LSBADC ADC DIGITAL FILTER ΣΔ MOD DIGITAL FILTER fs Kfs Kfs DEC fs Nyquist Operation Oversampling + Digital Filter + Decimation Oversampling + Noise Shaping + Digital Filter + Decimation A B C DEC fs
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。

原句BASIC LINEAR DESIGN 6.92 Figure 6.90: First-Order Sigma-Delta ADC Intuitively, a Σ-Δ ADC operates as follows.

原句Assume a dc input at V IN.

原句The integrator is constantly ramping up or down at node A.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句Th e output of the comparator is fed back through a 1-bit DAC to the summing input at node B.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 比较器 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释比较器：判断两个输入大小并输出逻辑电平；不能简单把普通运放当高速比较器。。
原句The negative feedback loop from the comparator output through the 1-bit DAC back to the summing point will force the average dc voltage at node B to be equal to V IN.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 负反馈、比较器 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释负反馈：把输出的一部分送回输入以减小误差、稳定增益、改善线性度，但会牺牲部分开环增益。；比较器：判断两个输入大小并输出逻辑电平；不能简单把普通运放当高速比较器。。
原句This implies that the average DAC output voltage must equal to the input voltage V IN.
中文译读可译为“必须/需要……”。这是约束条件，通常关系到 安全工作范围、精度或稳定性。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句The average DAC output voltage is controlled by the ones-density in the 1-bit data stream from the comparator output.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 比较器 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释比较器：判断两个输入大小并输出逻辑电平；不能简单把普通运放当高速比较器。。
原句As the input signal increases towards +V REF, the number of “ones” in the serial bit stream increases, and the number of “zeros” decrease s.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句Similarly, as the signal goes negative towards –VREF, the number of “ones” in the serial bit stream decreases, and the number of “zeros” increases.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句From a very simplistic standpo int, this analysis shows that the average value of the input voltage is contained in the serial bit stream out of the comparator.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 比较器 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。

原句The digital filter and decimator process the serial bit stream and produce the final output data.

原句For any given input value in a single sampli ng interval, the data fr om the 1-bit ADC is virtually meaningless.

原句Third, and higher, order Σ-Δ ADCs were once thought to be poten tially unstable at some values of input—recent analyses using finite rather than infinite gains in the comparator have shown that this is not necessar ily so, but even if instability does start to occu r, it is not important, since the DSP in the digital filter and decimator can be made to recognize incipient instability and react to prevent it. ∑ ANALOG FILTER H(f) = 1 f ∑ X Y + _ X – Y 1 f ( X – Y ) Q = QUANTIZATION NOISE Y = 1 f ( X – Y ) + Q REARRANGING, SOLVING FOR Y: Y = X f + 1 + Q f f + 1 SIGNAL TERM NOISE TERM Y

原句First of all, the simple linear models previously discussed are no l onger fully accurate.

原句Loops of order greater than two are generally not guaranteed to be stable under all input conditions.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句The instability arises because the comparator is a nonlinear element w hose effective “gain” varies inversely with the input level.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 比较器、稳定性 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释比较器：判断两个输入大小并输出逻辑电平；不能简单把普通运放当高速比较器。；稳定性：反馈电路不会自激振荡并具有足够瞬态裕量。。
原句This mechanism for in stability causes the following behavior: if the loop is operating normally, and a large signal is applied to the input that overloads the loop, the average gain of th e comparator is reduced.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 比较器、大信号、稳定性 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释比较器：判断两个输入大小并输出逻辑电平；不能简单把普通运放当高速比较器。；大信号：跨越明显非线性区域的整体行为，不能直接套小信号参数。；稳定性：反馈电路不会自激振荡并具有足够瞬态裕量。。
原句The reduction in comparator gain in the linear model causes l oop instability.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 比较器、稳定性 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释比较器：判断两个输入大小并输出逻辑电平；不能简单把普通运放当高速比较器。；稳定性：反馈电路不会自激振荡并具有足够瞬态裕量。。
原句This causes instability even when the signal that caused it is removed.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 稳定性 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释稳定性：反馈电路不会自激振荡并具有足够瞬态裕量。。
原句In actual practice, such a circuit would normally oscillate on power-up due to initial conditions caused by turn-on transients.

原句CONVERTERS SIGMA-DELTA CONVERTERS 6.101 For example, the group delay through the AD1 871 digital filter is 910 µs (sampling at 48 kSPS) and 460 µs (sampling at 96 kSPS)—thi s represents the time it takes for a step function input to propagate through one-half the number of taps in the digital filter.

原句When a step change is detected on the analog input, the second stage filter enters a second mode ( FASTStep™) where it performs a variable number of averages for so me time after the step change, and then the second stage filter switches back to the FIR filter mode.

原句In FASTStep mode with chopping enabled, the output has settled to the final value by the 7th output word.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句Between the 7th and the 23rd output, the FASTStep mode produces a settled result, but with additional noise compared to the specified noise level for normal operating conditions.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 噪声，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。

原句It starts at a noise level comparable to the SKIP mode, and as the averaging increases ends up at the specified noise level.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。

原句The complete settling time required for the part to return to the specified noise level is the same for FASTStep mode and normal mode.
中文译读可译为“必须/需要……”。这是约束条件，通常关系到 噪声。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句The FASTStep mode gives a much earlier indication of where the output channel is going and its new value.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句This feature is very useful in weigh scale applications to give a much earlier indication of the weight, or in an application scanning multiple channels where the user does not have to wait the full settling time to see if a channel has changed.
中文译读可译为“必须/需要……”。这是约束条件，通常关系到 安全工作范围、精度或稳定性。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Note, however, that the FASTStep mode is not particular ly suitable for multiplexed applications because of the excess noise associated with the settling time.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 噪声，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句For multiplexed applications, the full 23-cycle output word interval should be allowed for settling to a new channel.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句Figure 6.108: AD7730 Bridge Application (Simplified Schematic) The AD7730 gives the user access to the on -chip calibration registers allowing an external microprocessor to read the device's ca libration coefficients a nd also to write its own calibration coefficients to the part from prestored values in external E 2PROM.

原句It also means that the user can verify that the device has performed its calibration correctly by comparing the coefficients af ter calibration with prestored values in E2PROM.

原句Since the calibration coefficients are derived by performing a conversion on the input voltage provided, the accuracy of the calibration can only be as good as the noise level the part provides in the normal mode.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。

原句To optimize calibration accuracy, it is recommended to calibrate the part at its lowest output rate where the noise level is lowest.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。

原句The coefficients generated at any output rate will be valid for all selected output update rates.

原句The AD7730 requires an external voltage re ference, however, the power supply may be used as the reference in the ratiometric bridge application shown in Figure 6.108.

原句In this configuration, the bridge out put voltage is directly prop ortional to the bridge drive voltage which is also used to establish th e reference voltages to the AD7730.

原句CONVERTERS SIGMA-DELTA CONVERTERS 6.107 Band-pass Sigma-Delta Converters The Σ-Δ ADCs that we have described so far contain integrators, which are low-pass filters, whose pass band extends from dc.

原句Thus, their quantization noise is pushed up in frequency.

原句At present, most commercially available Σ-Δ ADCs are of this type (although some which are intended for us e in audio or telecommunica tions applications contain band-pass rather than low-pass digital filters to eliminate any system dc offsets).
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句But there is no particular reason why the filters of the Σ-Δ modulator should be LPFs, except that traditionally ADCs have been thought of as being baseband devices, and that integrators are somewhat easier to construct than band-pass filters.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句If we replace the integrators in a Σ-Δ ADC with band-pass filters (BPFs ) as shown in Figure 6.109, the quantization noise is moved up and down in frequency to leave a virtually noise-free region in the pass band (see References 31, 32 , and 33).
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句If the digi tal filter is then programmed to have its pass band in this region, we have a Σ-Δ ADC with a band-pass, rather than a low-pass characteristic.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句Such devices would appear to be useful in direct IFto-digital conversion, digital radios, ultrasound, and other undersampling applications.

原句However, the modulator and the digital BPF must be designed for the specific set of frequencies required by the syst em application, thereby somewhat limiting the flexibility of this approach.

原句In an undersampling application of a band-pass Σ-Δ ADC, the minimum sampling frequency must be at least twice the signal bandwidth, BW.

原句Sigma-Delta DACs Sigma-delta DACs operate very similarly to sigma-delta ADCs, however in a sigma-delta DAC, the noise shaping function is accomplished with a digital modulator rather than an analog one.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 噪声，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。

原句Figure 6.110: Sigma-Delta DACs A Σ-Δ DAC, unlike the Σ-Δ ADC, is mostly digital (see Fi gure 6.110A).
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句It consists of an “interpolation filter” (a digital circuit which accepts data at a low rate, inserts zeros at a high rate, and then applies a digital filter algorithm and outputs data at a high rate), a Σ-Δ modulator (which effectively acts as a low-pass filter to the signal but as a high-pass filter to the quantization noise, and converts the resulting data to a high speed bit stream), and a 1-bit DAC whose output switches between equal positive and negative reference voltages.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 噪声，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句The output is filtered in an external analog LPF.

展开本页文本译读与注释
原句CONVERTERS DAC AND ADC STATIC TRANSFER FUNCTION AND DC ERRORS 6.117 SECTION 6.5: DAC AND ADC STATIC TRANSFER FUNCTIONS AND DC ERRORS The four primary dc errors in a data converter are offset error, gain error, and two types of linearity error (differential and integral).
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Offset and gain errors are analogous to offset and gain errors in amplifiers as shown in Figure 6.113 fo r a bipolar input range.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句(Though offset error and zero error, which are identical in amplifiers and unipolar data converters, are not identical in bipolar converters and should be carefully distinguished.) The transfer characteristics of both DACs and ADCs may be expre ssed as D = K + GA, where D is the digital code, A is the analog signal, and K and G are constants.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句In a unipolar converter, K is zero, and in an offset bipolar conve rter, it is –1 MSB.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句The offset error is the amount by which the actual value of K differs from its ideal value.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Figure 6.113: Data Converter Offset and Gain Error The gain error is the amount by which G differs from its ideal value, and is generally expressed as the percentage difference between the two, although it may be defined as the gain error contribution (in mV or LSB) to the total error at full-scale.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。

原句These errors can usually be trimmed by the data converter user .
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Note, however, that amplifier offset is trimmed at zero input, and then the gain is trimmed near to full-scale.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。

原句The trim algorithm for a bipolar data converter is not so straightforward.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句The integral linearity error of a converter is also analogous to the linearity error of an amplifier, and is defined as the maximum deviation of the actual transfer characteristic of the converter from a straight line, and is gene rally expressed as a percentage of full-scale (but may be given in LSBs).
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句For an ADC, the most popular conven tion is to draw the straight line through the mid- points of the codes, or the code centers.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句There are two common ways of choosing the straight line: end point and best straight line as shown in Figure 6.114.

原句ACTUAL OFFSET ERROR WITH GAIN ERROR: OFFSET ERROR = 0 ZERO ERROR RESULTS FROM GAIN ERROR ACTUAL IDEAL IDEAL ZERO ERROR ZERO ERROR NO GAIN ERROR: ZERO ERROR = OFFSET ERROR 0 0 –FS –FS +FS +FS

原句BASIC LINEAR DESIGN 6.118 Figure 6.114: Method of Measuring Integral Linearity Errors (Same Converter on Both Graphs) In the endpoint system, the deviation is measured from the straight line through the origin and the full-scale point (after ga in adjustment).
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句This is the most useful integral linearity measurement for measurement and control appl ications of data converters (since error budgets depend on deviation from the ideal tr ansfer characteristic, not from some arbitrary “best fit”), and is the one normally adopted by Analog Devices, Inc.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句The best straight line , however, does give a better pr ediction of distortion in ac applications, and also gives a lower value of “linearity error” on a data sheet.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。

原句The best fit straight line is drawn through the transfer characteristic of the device using standard curve fitting techniques, and the maximum de viation is measured from this line.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句In general, the integral linearit y error measured in this way is only 50% of the value measured by end point methods.

原句Fo r ac applications, it is even better to specify distortion than dc linearity, so it is rarely necessary to use the best straight line method to define converter linearity.

原句The other type of converter nonlinearity is differential nonlinearity (DNL).

原句This relates to the linearity of the code transi tions of the converter.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句In the ideal case, a change of 1 LSB in digital code corresp onds to a change of exactly 1 LSB of analog signal.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句In a DAC, a change of 1 LSB in digital code produces exactly 1 LSB change of analog output, while in an ADC there should be exactly 1 LSB change of analog input to move from one digital transition to the next.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Differential linearity error is defined as the maximum amount of deviation of any quantum (or LSB ch ange) in the entire transfer function from its ideal size of 1 LSB.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Where the change in analog signal corresponding to 1 LSB digital change is more or less than 1 LSB, there is said to be a DNL erro r.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句The DNL error of a converter is normally defined as the maximum value of DNL to be found at any transition across the range of the converter.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句Figure 6.115 shows the nonideal transfer functions for a DAC and an ADC and shows the effects of the DNL error.

原句CONVERTERS DAC AND ADC STATIC TRANSFER FUNCTION AND DC ERRORS 6.119 Figure 6.115: Transfer Functions for Nonideal 3-Bit DAC and ADC Figure 6.116: Details of DAC Differential Nonlinearity The DNL of a DAC is examined more closely in Figure 6.116.

原句If the DNL of a DAC is less than –1 LSB at any transition, the DAC is nonmonotonic i.e., its transfer characteristic contains one or more localized maxima or minima.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句A DNL greater than +1 LSB does not cause nonmonotonicity, but is sti ll undesirable.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。

原句In many DAC applications (especially closed-loop systems where nonmonotonicity can change negative feedback to positive feedback), it is critically important that DACs are monotonic.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 负反馈、正反馈 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释负反馈：把输出的一部分送回输入以减小误差、稳定增益、改善线性度，但会牺牲部分开环增益。；正反馈：反馈信号强化输入误差，常用于比较器迟滞或振荡器；线性放大中要谨慎。。
原句DAC monotonicity DIGITAL INPUT ANALOG OUTPUT FS 000 001 010 011 100 101 110 111 NON-MONOTONIC ANALOG INPUT DIGITAL OUTPUT FS 000 001 010 011 100 101 110 111 MISSING CODE DAC ADC d d 1 LSB, DNL = 0 2 LSB, DNL = +1 LSB 1 LSB, DNL = 0 –1 LSB, DNL = –2 LSB 1 LSB, DNL = 0 1 LSB, DNL = 0 2 LSB, DNL = +1 LSB DIGITAL CODE INPUT ANALOG OUTPUT NON-MONOTONIC IF DNL < –1 LSB BIT 2 IS 1 LSB HIGH BIT 1 IS 1 LSB LOW 000 001 010 011 100 101 110 111 FS

原句BASIC LINEAR DESIGN 6.120 is often explicitly specified on data sheets, although if the DNL is guaranteed to be less than 1 LSB (i.e., |DNL| ≤ 1 LSB) then the device must be monotonic, even without an explicit guarantee.
中文译读可译为“必须/需要……”。这是约束条件，通常关系到 安全工作范围、精度或稳定性。

原句As in the case of DACs, this can present major problems—especially in servo applications.

补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句In a DAC, there can be no missing codes— each digital input word will produce a corresponding analog output.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句However, DACs can be nonmonotonic as previously discussed.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句In a straight binary DAC, the most likely place a nonmonotonic condition can develop is at midscale between the two codes: 011…11 and 100…00.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句If a nonmonotonic condition occurs here, it is generally because the DAC is not properly calibrated or trimmed.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句A successive approximation ADC w ith an internal nonmonotonic DAC will generally produce missing codes but remain monotonic.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句However it is possible for an ADC to be nonmonotonic—again depending on the particular conversion architecture.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Figure 6.118 shows the transfer function of an ADC which is nonmonotonic and has a missing code.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Figure 6.119: Errors Associated with Improperly Trimmed Subranging ADC ADCs which use the subranging architecture divide the i nput range into a number of coarse segments, and each coarse segment is further divided into smaller segments—and ultimately the final code is derived.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句This process is described in more detail in Chapter 4 of this book.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句An improper ly trimmed subranging ADC may exhibit nonmonotonicity, wide codes, or missing codes at the subranging points as shown in Figure 6.119 A, B, and C, respectively.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句This type of ADC should be trimmed so that dr ift due to aging or temperature produces wide c odes at the sensitive points rather than nonmonotonic or missing codes.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句NON-MONOTONIC NON-MONOTONIC WIDE CODE WIDE CODE MISSING CODE MISSING CODE (A) NON-MONOTONIC (B) WIDE CODES (C) MISSING CODES ANALOG INPUT

展开本页文本译读与注释
原句BASIC LINEAR DESIGN 6.122 Defining missing codes is more difficult than defining nonmonotonicity.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句All ADCs suffer from some inherent transition noise as shown in Figure 6.120 (think of it as the flicker between adjacent values of the last digit of a DVM).
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句As resolutions and bandwidths become higher, the range of input over whic h transition noise occurs may approach, or even exceed, 1 LSB.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 带宽、噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释带宽：满足指定增益/误差条件的频率范围。；噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句High resolution wide band ADCs generally have internal noise sources which can be reflected to the input as effective input noise summed with the signal.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句The effect of this noise, especially if combined with a negative DNL error, may be that there are some (or even all) codes wh ere transition noise is present for the whole range of inputs.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句There are therefor e some codes for which there is no input which will guarantee that code as an output, although there may be a range of inputs which will sometimes produce that code.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Figure 6.120: Combined Effects of Code Transition Noise and DNL For low resolution ADCs, it may be reasonable to define no missing codes as a combination of transition noise and DNL which guarantees some level (perhaps 0.2 LSB) of noise-free code for all codes.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句However, this is impossible to achieve at the very high resolutions achieved by modern sigma-delta ADC s, or even at lower resolutions in wide bandwidth sampling ADCs.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 带宽，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释带宽：满足指定增益/误差条件的频率范围。。
原句In these cases, the manufacturer must define noise levels and resolution in some other way.
中文译读可译为“必须/需要……”。这是约束条件，通常关系到 噪声。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句Which method is used is less important, but the data sheet should contain a clear definition of the method used and the performance to be expected.
中文译读可译为“它可用于/常用于……”。本句强调 该结构 的用途，设计时还要检查适用条件和限制。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句A complete discussion of effective input noise follows later in this chapter.
中文译读本句在说明本章范围：噪声；阅读时应把它当作本章学习路线，而不是孤立结论。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句The discussion thus far has not dealt with the most important dc specifications associated with data converters.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Other less important specifications require only a definition.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Accuracy, Absolute.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Absolute accuracy error of a DAC is the difference between actual analog output and the output that is expected when a given digital co de is applied to the converter.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Error is usually commensurate with resolution, i.e., less 1/2 LSB of full-scale, for example.
中文译读这是举例说明。例子的作用是把 前面的抽象概念 落到具体数值、器件或电路情形上。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句However, accuracy may be much better than resolution in some applications; for example, a 4-bit referen ce supply having only 16 discrete digitally chosen levels would have a resolution of 1/16, but it might have an accuracy to within 0.01 % of each ideal value.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句ADC INPUT ADC INPUT ADC INPUT CODE TRANSITION NOISE DNL TRANSITION NOISE AND DNL ADC OUTPUT CODE
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。

PDF 第 127 页

展开本页文本译读与注释
原句CONVERTERS DAC AND ADC STATIC TRANSFER FUNCTION AND DC ERRORS 6.123 Absolute accuracy error of an ADC at a given output code is the difference between the actual and the theoretical analog input voltage s required to produce that code.
中文译读可译为“必须/需要……”。这是约束条件，通常关系到 安全工作范围、精度或稳定性。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Since the code can be produced by any analog voltage in a finite band (see Quantizing Uncertainty), the “input required to produce that c ode” is defined as the midpoint of the band of inputs that will produce that code .
中文译读可译为“必须/需要……”。这是约束条件，通常关系到 安全工作范围、精度或稳定性。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句For example, if 5 volts, ±1.2 mV, will theoretically produce a 12-bit half-scale code of 1000 0000 0000, then a converter for which any voltage from 4.997 V to 4.999 V will produce that code will have absolute error of (1/2)(4.997 + 4.999) – 5 V = +2 mV.
中文译读这是举例说明。例子的作用是把 前面的抽象概念 落到具体数值、器件或电路情形上。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Sources of error include gain (calibration) error, zero error, linearity errors, and noise.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句Absolute accuracy measurements should be made under a set of standard conditions with sources and meters traceable to an internationally accepted standard.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Accuracy, Logarithmic DACs.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句The difference (measured in dB) between the actual transfer function and the ideal transfer function, as measur ed after calibration of gain error at 0 dB.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Accuracy, Relative.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Relative accuracy error, expressed in %, ppm, or fractions of 1 LSB, is the deviation of the analog value at any c ode (relative to the full analog range of the device transfer characteristic) from its theoretical value (relative to the same range), after the full-scale range (FSR) has been calibrated (see Full-Scale Range).
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Since the discrete analog values that corres pond to the digital values ideally lie on a straight line, the specified worst case relative accuracy error of a linear ADC or DAC can be interpreted as a measure of end-point nonlinearity (see Linearity).
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句The “discrete points” of a DAC transfer characteristic ar e measured by the actual analog outputs.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句The “discrete points” of an ADC tran sfer characteristic are the midpoints of the quantization bands at each code (see Accuracy, Absolute).
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Temperature Coefficient.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句In general, temperature instab ilities are expressed as %/°C, ppm/°C, fractions of 1 LSB per degree C, or as a change in a parameter over a specified temperature range.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Measurements are usually made at room temperature and at the extremes of the specified range, and the temp erature coefficient (tempco, TC) is defined as the change in the parameter, divided by the corresponding temperature change.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Parameters of interest include gain, linearity, offset (bipolar), and zero. a.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Gain Tempco: Two factors principally affect converter gain stability with temperature.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 稳定性 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释稳定性：反馈电路不会自激振荡并具有足够瞬态裕量。。
原句In fixed-reference converters, the reference voltage will vary with temperature.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句The reference circuitry and switches (and comparator in aid converters) will also contribute to the overall gain TC. b.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 比较器 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释比较器：判断两个输入大小并输出逻辑电平；不能简单把普通运放当高速比较器。。
原句Linearity Tempco: Sensitivity of linearity (integral and/or differential linearity) to temperature, in % FSR/°C or ppm FS R/°C, over the specified range.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Monotonic behavior in DACs is achieved if the differential nonlinearity is less than 1 LSB at any temperature in the range of interest.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句The differential nonlinearity temperature coefficient may be expressed as a ratio, as a maximum change over a temperature range, and/or implied by a statement that the device is monotonic over the specified temperature range.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句To avoid missing codes in noiseless ADCs, it is sufficient that the differential
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。

展开本页文本译读与注释
原句BASIC LINEAR DESIGN 6.124 nonlinearity error magnitude be greater than –1 LSB at any temperature in the range of interest.

原句The differential nonlin earity temperature coeffici ent is often implied by the statement that there are no missed codes when operating within a specified temperature range.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句In DACs, the differential nonlinearity TC is often implied by the statement that the DAC is monotonic over a specified temperature range. c.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句Zero TC (unipolar converters): The temperature stability of a unipolar fixed-reference DAC, measured in % FSR/°C or ppm FSR/°C, is principally affected by current leakage (current-output DAC), and offs et voltage and bias current of the output op amp (voltage-output DAC).
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 运放、稳定性 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释运放：高增益差分放大器；分析时先确认是否处于负反馈线性区。；稳定性：反馈电路不会自激振荡并具有足够瞬态裕量。。
原句The zero stabil ity of an ADC is dependent on the zero stability of the DAC or integrator and/or the input buffer and the comparator.
中文译读可译为“结果取决于……”。关键依赖项是 比较器、稳定性，不能只看单一典型值。
补充注释比较器：判断两个输入大小并输出逻辑电平；不能简单把普通运放当高速比较器。；稳定性：反馈电路不会自激振荡并具有足够瞬态裕量。。
原句It is typically expressed in µV/°C or in percent or ppm of full-scale range (FSR) per degree C. d.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Offset Tempco: The temperature coefficient of the all-DAC-switches-off (minus full-scale) point of a bipolar converter (in % FSR/°C or ppm FSR/°C) depends on three major factors—the tempco of the refere nce source, the voltage zero-stability of the output amplifier, and the tracki ng capability of the bipolar-o ffset resistors and the gain resistors.
中文译读可译为“结果取决于……”。关键依赖项是 稳定性，不能只看单一典型值。
补充注释稳定性：反馈电路不会自激振荡并具有足够瞬态裕量。。
原句In an ADC, the co rresponding tempco of the nega tive full-scale point depends on similar quantities—the tempco of the refe rence source, the voltage stability of the input buffer and the sample-and-hold, and the tr acking capabilities of the bipolar offset resistors and the gain-setting resistors.
中文译读可译为“结果取决于……”。关键依赖项是 稳定性，不能只看单一典型值。
补充注释稳定性：反馈电路不会自激振荡并具有足够瞬态裕量。。
原句Common-Mode Range.

原句Common-mode rejection usually varies with the magnitude of the range through which the input signal can swing, determin ed by the sum of the commonmode and the differential voltage.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句Common-mode range is that range of total input voltage over which specified common-mode rejection is maintained.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句For example, if the common-mode signal is ±5 V and the differe ntial signal is ±5 V, the common-mode range is ±10 V.
中文译读这是举例说明。例子的作用是把 前面的抽象概念 落到具体数值、器件或电路情形上。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Common-Mode Rejection (CMR) is a measure of the change in output voltage when both inputs are changed by equal amounts of ac and/ or dc voltage.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Common-mode rejection is usually expressed either as a ratio (e.g., CMRR = 1,000,000:1), or in decibels: CMR = 20log10CMRR; if CMRR = 10 6, CMR = 120 dB.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句A CMRR of 10 6 means that 1 volt of common mode is processed by the device as though it were a differential signal of 1microvolt at the input.

原句CMR is usually specified for a full-range common-mode voltage change (CMV), at a given frequency, and a specified imba lance of source impedance (e.g., 1 k Ω source unbalance, at 60 Hz).
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 阻抗 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释阻抗：交流中电压与电流的复数比，包含电阻和电抗。。
原句In amplifiers, the comm on-mode rejection ratio is defined as the ratio of the signal gain, G, to the common-mode gain (the ratio of common-mode signal appearing at the output to the CMV at the input.

原句The real and complex impedances measured at each analog input port of an ADC.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 阻抗 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释阻抗：交流中电压与电流的复数比，包含电阻和电抗。。
原句The re sistance is measured statically and the capacitance and differential input impedances are measured with a network analyzer.

原句The peak-to-peak differential voltage that must be applied to the converter to generate a full-scale response.
中文译读可译为“必须/需要……”。这是约束条件，通常关系到 安全工作范围、精度或稳定性。

原句Peak differential voltage is computed by observing the voltage on a single pin and subtracting the voltage from the other pin, which is 180 degrees out of phase.

原句There are several other terms, with differing meanings, that are often used in the context of discussions or operations involving full-scale range.

补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句They are: Full-scale—similar to full-scale range, but pe rtaining to a single polarity.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Thus, full-scale for a unipolar device is twice the prescribed value of the MSB and has the same polarity.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句For a bipolar device, positive or nega tive full-scale is that positive or negative value, of which the next bit after the polarity bit is tested to be one-half.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Span—the scalar voltage or current range corresponding to FSR.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句All-1’s—All bits on, the condition used, in conjunction with all-zeros, for gain adjustment of an ADC or DAC, in accordance with the manufacturer's instructions.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句Its magnitude, for a binary device, is (l – 2 –N) FSR.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句All-1’s is a positive-true definition of a specific magnitude relationship; for complementary coding the “all-l's” code will actually be all zeros.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句To avoid confusion, all-l’s should never be called "f ull-scale;" FSR and FS are independent of the number of bits, all-l’s isn't.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句All-0’s—All bits off, the condition used in offset (a nd gain) adjustment of a DAC or ADC, according to the manufacturer's instru ctions.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句All-0’s corresponds to zero output in a unipolar DAC and negative full-scale in an offset bipolar DAC with positive output reference.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句In a sign-magnitude device, all-0’s refers to all bits after the sign bit.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Analogous to “all-l’s,” “all-0’s” is a positive-true definition of the all-bits-off condition; in a complementary-coded device, it is expres sed by all ones.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句To avoid confusion, all-0’s should not be called “zero” un less it accurately corresponds to true analog zero output from a DAC.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句The best way of defining the cr itical points for an actual device is a brief table of critical codes and the ideal voltages, currents, or gains to which they correspond, with the conditions for measurement defined.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句BASIC LINEAR DESIGN 6.126 Gain: The “gain” of a converter is that analog scale factor setting that establishes the nominal conversion relationship, e.g., 10 volts full-scale.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句In a multiplying DAC or ratiometric ADC, it is indeed a gain.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句In a de vice with fixed internal reference, it is expressed as the full-scale magnitude of the output parameter (e.g., 10 volts or 2 milliamperes).
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句In a fixed-reference converter, where the use of the internal reference is optional, the converter gain and the referen ce may be specified separately.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句Gain and zero adjustment are discussed under zero.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句Impedance, Input: The dynamic load of an ADC pres ented to its input source.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 阻抗 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释阻抗：交流中电压与电流的复数比，包含电阻和电抗。。
原句In unbuffered CMOS switched-capacitor ADCs, the presence of current transients at the converter's clock frequency mandates that the converter be driven from a low impedance (at the frequencies contained in the transi ents) in order to accurately convert.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 阻抗、CMOS 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释阻抗：交流中电压与电流的复数比，包含电阻和电抗。；CMOS：互补 MOS 技术，静态功耗低，是现代数字/混合信号电路基础。。
原句For buffered-input ADCs, the input impedance is generally represented by a resistive and capacitive component.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 阻抗 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释阻抗：交流中电压与电流的复数比，包含电阻和电抗。。
原句Input-Referred Noise (Effective Input Noise) : Input-referred noise can be viewed as the net effect of all internal ADC noise sources referred to the input.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句It is generally expressed in LSBs rms, but can also be expressed as a voltage.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句It can be converted to a peak-to-peak value by multiplying by the factor 6.6.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句The peak-to-peak input-referred noise can then be used to calculate the noise-free code resolution.
中文译读可译为“它可用于/常用于……”。本句强调 噪声 的用途，设计时还要检查适用条件和限制。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句(See noise-free code resolution).
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句Leakage Current, Output: Current which appears at the output terminal of a DAC with all bits “off.” For a converter with two comple mentary outputs (for example, many fast CMOS DACs), output leakage current is the cu rrent measured at OUT 1, with all digital inputs low—and the current measured at OUT 2, with all digital inputs high.
中文译读这是举例说明。例子的作用是把 CMOS 落到具体数值、器件或电路情形上。
补充注释CMOS：互补 MOS 技术，静态功耗低，是现代数字/混合信号电路基础。。
原句Output Propagation Delay: For an ADC having a single -ended sampling (or ENCODE) clock input, the delay between the 50% point of the sampling clock and the time when all output data bits are within valid logic le vels.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句For an ADC having differential sampling clock inputs, the delay is measured with re spect to the zero-crossing of the differential sampling clock signal.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Output Voltage Tolerance: For a reference, the maximu m deviation from the normal output voltage at 25°C and specified input voltage, as measured by a device traceable to a recognized fundamental voltage standard.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Overload: An input voltage exceeding the ADC's full-scale input range producing an overload condition.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Overvoltage Recovery Time: Overvoltage recovery time is defined as the amount of time required for an ADC to achieve a specified accuracy after an overv oltage (usually 50% greater than full-scale range), measured from the time the overvoltage signal reenters the converter's range.
中文译读可译为“必须/需要……”。这是约束条件，通常关系到 安全工作范围、精度或稳定性。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句The ADC should act as an ideal limiter for out -of-range signals, producing a positive or negative full-scale code during the overvoltage condition.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Some ADCs provide over- and under-range flags to a llow gain-adjustment circuits to be activated.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Overrange, Overvoltage: An input signal that exceeds the input range of an ADC, but is less than an overload.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。

展开本页文本译读与注释
原句CONVERTERS DAC AND ADC STATIC TRANSFER FUNCTION AND DC ERRORS 6.127 Power-Supply Rejection Ratio (PSRR: The ratio of a change in dc power supply voltage to the resulting change in th e specified device error, expr essed in percentage, parts per million, or fractions of 1 LSB.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 电源 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释电源：为电路提供能量；要同时考虑电压、电流、纹波、瞬态和保护。。
原句It may also be expressed logarithmically, in dB (PSR = 20 log10 (PSRR)).
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Power Supply Sensitivity.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 电源 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释电源：为电路提供能量；要同时考虑电压、电流、纹波、瞬态和保护。。
原句The sensitivity of a converter to changes in the power supply voltages is normally expressed in terms of percent-of-full-scale change in analog value or fractions of 1 LSB—(DAC output, ADC output c ode-center) for a 1% dc change in the power supply, e.g., 0.05%/% ΔVS.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 电源 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释电源：为电路提供能量；要同时考虑电压、电流、纹波、瞬态和保护。。
原句Power supply sensitivity may also be expressed in relation to a specified maximum dc shift of power supply voltage.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 电源 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释电源：为电路提供能量；要同时考虑电压、电流、纹波、瞬态和保护。。
原句A converter might be considered “good” if the change in readi ng at full-scale does not exceed ±½ LSB for a 3% change in power supply voltage.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 电源 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释电源：为电路提供能量；要同时考虑电压、电流、纹波、瞬态和保护。。
原句Even better specs are necessary for converters designed for direct battery operation.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Ratiometric: The output of an ADC is a digital number proportional to the ratio of (some measure of) the input to a reference voltage.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Most requirements for conversions call for an absolute measurement, i.e., against a fixed reference; but this presumes that the signal applied to the converter is either referen ce independent, or in some way derived from another fixed reference.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Howeve r, real references are not tr uly fixed; the references for both the converter and the signa l source vary with time, temperature, loading, etc.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Therefore, if the converter is used with signa l sources that also re ly on references (for example, strain-gage bridges, RTDs, thermistors), it makes sense to replace this multiplicity of references by a single system reference; reference-caused errors will tend to cancel out.
中文译读可译为“它可用于/常用于……”。本句强调 该结构 的用途，设计时还要检查适用条件和限制。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句This can be done by using the converter's internal reference (if it has one) as the system reference.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Another way is to use a separate external system reference, which also becomes the reference for a ratiometric converter.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Over limited ranges, ratiometric conversion ca n also serve as a substitute for analog or digital signal division (where the denominat or changes by less than ½LSB during the conversion).
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句The signal input is the numerator; the reference input is the denominator.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句Total Unadjusted Error: A comprehensive specification on some devices which includes full-scale error, relative-accuracy and zer o-code errors, under a specified set of conditions.

原句Figure 6.121: Dynamic Performance Analysis of an Ideal N-bit ADC In most applications, the input to the ADC is a band of frequencies (usually summed with some noise), so the quantization noise te nds to be random.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。

原句In spectral analysis applications (or in performing FFTs on ADC s using spectrally pure sinewaves—see Figure 6.121), however, the correlation betw een the quantization noise and the signal depends upon the ratio of the sampling fr equency to the input signal.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 噪声，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。

原句This is demonstrated in Figure 6.122, where an id eal 12-bit ADCs output is analyzed using a 4096-point FFT.

原句In the left-hand FFT plot, th e ratio of the sampling frequency to the input frequency was chosen to be exactly 32, and the worst harmonic is about 76 dB below the fundamental.

原句The right hand diagram shows the effects of slightly offsetting the ratio to 4096/127 = 32.25196850394, showing a relatively random noise spectrum, where the SFDR is now about 92 dBc.

原句BASIC LINEAR DESIGN 6.130 Note that this variation in the apparent harm onic distortion of the ADC is an artifact of the sampling process and the correlation of the quantization er ror with the input frequency.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句In a practical ADC application, the quantization error generally appears as random noise because of the random natu re of the wideband input signal and the additional fact that there is a usually a sm all amount of system noise which acts as a dither signal to further randomize the quantization error spectrum.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句It is important to understand the above point, because single-tone sine wave FFT testing of ADCs is a universally accepted method of performance evalua tion.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句In order to accurately measure the harmonic distortion of an ADC, steps must be taken to ensure that the test setup truly measures the ADC distor tion, not the artifact s due to quantization noise correlation.
中文译读可译为“必须/需要……”。这是约束条件，通常关系到 噪声。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句This is done by properl y choosing the frequency ratio and sometimes by injecting a small amount of noise (dithe r) with the input signal.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句The exact same precautions apply to measuring DAC distortion with an analog spectrum analyzer.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Figure 6.123 shows the FFT output for an ideal 12-bit ADC.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句No te that the average value of the noise floor of the FFT is approximately 100 dB below full-scale, but the theoretical SNR of a 12-bit ADC is 74 dB.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 噪声，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句The FFT noise floor is not the SNR of the ADC, because the FFT acts like an analog spectrum analyzer with a bandwidth of f s/M, where M is the number of points in the FFT.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 带宽、噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释带宽：满足指定增益/误差条件的频率范围。；噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句The theoretical FFT noise floor is therefore 10log10(M/2) dB below the quantization noise floor due to the processing gain of the FFT.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句In the case of an ideal 12-bit ADC with an SNR of 74 dB, a 4096-point FFT would result in a processing gain of 10log 10(4096/2) = 33 dB, thereby re sulting in an overall FFT noise floor of 74 + 33 = 107 dBc.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句In fact , the FFT noise floor can be reduced even further by going to larger and larger FFTs; just as an analog spectrum analyzer’s noise floor can be reduced by narro wing the bandwidth.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 带宽、噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释带宽：满足指定增益/误差条件的频率范围。；噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句When tes ting ADCs using FFTs, it is important to ensure that the FFT size is large enough so th at the distortion products can be distinguished from the FFT noise floor itself.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句Figure 6.123: Noise Floor for an Ideal 12-bit ADC Using 4096-point FFT RMS QUANTIZATION NOISE LEVEL FFT NOISE FLOOR BIN SPACING = ADC FULLSCALE (dB) 0 20 40 60 80 100 120 74dB = 6.02N + 1.76dB 33dB = 10log N = 12-BITS M = 4096 fs 4096 fs 2 74dB 107dB M 2( )10

原句In this discus sion, assume that sequential outputs of the ADC are loaded into a buffer memory of length M and that the FFT processor provides the spectral output.

原句Ho wever, when examining the output noise floor, the FFT processing gain (dependent on M) must be considered.

原句M 2PROCESS ING GAIN = 10log 10 ROUND OFF ERROR (NEGLIGIBLE) () fs ADC N N-BITS TEST SYSTEM ANALOG INPUT NOISE DISTORTION BAND LIMITING NOISE DISTORTION BAND LIMITING APERTURE JITTER QUANTIZATION NOISE DIFFERENTIAL NON-LINEARITY INTEGRAL NON-LINEARITY TO MEMORY BUFFER SAMPLE AND HOLD ENCODER M-POINT FFT PROCESSOR BUFFER MEMORY M- WORDS M 2 POINT SPECTRAL OUTPUT Figure 6.124: ADC Model Showing Noise and Distortion Sources Equivalent Input Referred Noise Wideband ADC internal circuits produce a certain amount of rms noise due to resistor and kT/C noise.

原句This noise is present even for dc-input signals, and accounts for the fact that the output of most wideband (or high re solution) ADCs is a distribution of codes, centered around the nominal value of a dc input (see Figure 6.125).
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句To measure its value, the input of the ADC is eith er grounded or connected to a heavily decoupled voltage source, and a large number of output samples are collected and plotted as a histogram (sometimes referred to as a grounded-input histogram).
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Since the noise is approximately Gaussian, the standard deviation of the hist ogram is easily calculated (see Reference 6), corresponding to the effective input rms noise.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句It is common practice to express this rms noise in terms of LSBs rms, although it can be expressed as an rms voltage referenced to the ADC full-scale input range.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 电压基准、噪声，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释电压基准：提供稳定、低噪声、低漂移的参考电压，是 ADC/DAC 精度链路的一部分。；噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。

原句The total range of an N-bit ADC is 2 N LSBs.

原句Integral and Differential Nonlinearity Distortion Effects One of the first things to realize when exam ining the nonlinearities of data converters is that the transfer function of a data conve rter has artifacts wh ich do not occur in conventional linear devices such as op amps or gain blocks.

原句The overall integral nonlinearity of an ADC is due to the integr al nonlinearity of the front-end and SHA as well as the overall integral nonlinearity in the ADC transfer function.

原句The second and third harmonics are generally the only ones specified on a data sheet because they tend to be the largest, although some data sheets may specify the value of the worst harmonic.

原句BASIC LINEAR DESIGN 6.136 Harmonic distortion is normally specified in dBc (decibels below carrier), although at audio frequencies it may be specified as a percentage.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Harmonic di stortion is generally specified with an input signal near full-scale (generally 0.5 dB to 1 dB below full-scale to prevent clipping), but it can be specified at any level.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句For signals much lower than fullscale, other distortion products due to the DNL of the converter (not direct harmonics) may limit performance.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Total harmonic distortion (THD) is the ratio of the rms value of the fundamental signal to the mean value of the root-sum-square of its harmonics (generally, only the first five are significant).
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句THD of an ADC is also generally specified with the input signal close to full-scale, although it can be specified at any level.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Total harmonic distortion plus noise (THD + N) is the ratio of the rms value of the fundamental signal to the mean value of the root-sum-square of its harmonics plus all noise components (excluding dc).
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句The bandwidth over which the noise is measured must be specified.
中文译读可译为“必须/需要……”。这是约束条件，通常关系到 带宽、噪声。
补充注释带宽：满足指定增益/误差条件的频率范围。；噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句In the case of an FFT, the bandwidth is dc to f s/2.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 带宽 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释带宽：满足指定增益/误差条件的频率范围。。
原句(If the bandwidth of the measurement is dc to fs/2, THD + N is equal to SINAD—see below).
中文译读可译为“二者相等/代数关系成立”。这里的核心量是 带宽，使用时要先统一参考方向和符号。
补充注释带宽：满足指定增益/误差条件的频率范围。。
原句Signal-to-Noise-and-Distortion Ra tio (SINAD), Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR), and Effective Number of Bits (ENOB) SINAD and SNR deserve careful attention, beca use there is still some variation between ADC manufacturers as to their precise meaning.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句Signal-to-noise-and Distortion (SINAD, or S/(N + D) is the ratio of the rms signal amplitude to the mean value of the root-sumsquare (rss) of all ot her spectral components, including harmonics, but excluding dc (see Figure 6.130).
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 噪声，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句SINAD is a good indication of the overall dynamic performance of an ADC as a function of input frequency because it includes all components which make up noise (including thermal noise) and distortion.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句It is often plotte d for various input amplitudes.

原句SINAD is equal to THD + N if the bandwidth for the noise measurement is the same.
中文译读可译为“二者相等/代数关系成立”。这里的核心量是 带宽、噪声，使用时要先统一参考方向和符号。

原句Figure 6.130: SINAD, ENOB, and SNR  SINAD (Signal -to-Noise-and-Distortion Ratio): z The ratio of therms signal amplitude to the mean value of the root-sum-squares (RSS) of all other spectral components, including harmonics, but excluding DC.  ENOB (Effective Number ofBits):  SNR (Signal -to-Noise Ratio, or Signal-to-Noise Ratio Without Harmonics: z The ratio of therms signal amplitude to the mean value of the root-sum-squares (RSS) of all other spectral components, excluding the first 5 harmonics and DC ENOB = SINAD – 1.76dB 6.02

原句Like an amplifier, the analog bandwidth specification of a c onverter does not imply that the ADC maintains good distortion performance up to its bandwidth fr equency.

原句CONVERTERS DATA CONVERTER AC ERRORS 6.141 Two Tone Intermodulation Distortion (IMD) Two tone IMD is measured by applying two sp ectrally pure sine waves to the ADC at frequencies f1 and f2, usually relatively close together.

原句Figure 6.136: Second and Third-Order Intermodulation Products for f1 = 5 MHz, f2 = 6 MHz Note, however, that if the two tones are close to f s/4, then the aliased third harmonics of the fundamentals can make the identification of the actual 2f 2 – f1 and 2f 1 – f2 products difficult.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。

原句These power level values are usually referenced to the output power of the device delivered to a matched load (usually, but not necessarily 50 Ω) expressed in dBm.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 上述概念，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。

原句It should be noted that IP2, IP3, and the 1 dB compression point are all a function of frequency, and as one would expect, the distortion is worse at higher frequencies.

原句For a given frequency, knowing the third order intercept point allows calculation of the approximate level of the third-order IMD products as a function of output signal level.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句The concept of second and third-order intercept points is not valid for an ADC, because the distortion products do not vary in a predictable manne r (as a function of signal amplitude).
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句The ADC does not gradually be gin to compress signals approaching fullscale (there is no 1 dB comp ression point); it acts as a hard limiter as soon as the signal exceeds the ADC input range, thereby suddenly producing extreme amounts of distortion because of clipping.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句On the other hand, for si gnals much below full-scale, the distortion floor remains relatively constant and is i ndependent of signal le vel.

原句Wideband CDMA (W-CDMA) Adjacent Channel Power Ratio (ACPR) and Adjacent Channel Leakage Ratio (ADLR) A wideband CDMA channel has a bandwidth of approximately 3.84 MHz, and channel spacing is 5 MHz.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 带宽 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释带宽：满足指定增益/误差条件的频率范围。。
原句The ratio in dBc between the measured power within a channel relative to its adjacent channel is defined as the adjacent channel power ratio (ACPR).
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句The ratio in dBc between the measured power within the ch annel bandwidth relative to the noise level in an adjacent empt y carrier channel is defined as adjacent channel leakage ratio (ACLR).
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 带宽、噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释带宽：满足指定增益/误差条件的频率范围。；噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句Figure 6.141: Wideband CDMA (W-CDMA) Adjacent Channel Leakage Ratio (ACLR) Figure 6.141 shows a single wideband CDMA channel centered at 140 MHz sampled at a frequency of 76.8 MSPS using the AD6645.

原句Noise Power Ratio (NPR) Noise power ratio has been used extensively to measure the transmission characteristics of Frequency Division Multiple Access (FDMA) communications links (see Reference 7).
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。

原句In a typical FDMA system, 4-kHz wide voice channels are “stacked” in frequency bins for transmission over coaxial, microwave, or satellite equipment.

原句At the receiving end, the FDMA data is demultiplexed an d returned to 4-kHz individual baseband channels.

原句In an FDMA system having more than approximately 100 channels, the FDMA signal can be approximated by Gaussian noise with the appropriate bandwidth.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 带宽、噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释带宽：满足指定增益/误差条件的频率范围。；噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句An individual 4-kHz channel can be measured for “quietness” usi ng a narrow-band notch (band-stop) filter and a specially tuned receiv er which measures the noise power inside the 4-kHz notch (see Figure 6.142).
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句Noise Power Ratio (NPR) measurements are st raightforward.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句With the notch filter out, the rms noise power of the signal inside the notch is measured by the narrowband receiver.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句The notch filter is then switched in, and the residual noise inside the slot is measured.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句The ratio of these two readings e xpressed in dB is th e NPR.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Several slot frequencies across the noise bandwidth (low, midband, and high) are tested to characterize the system ade quately.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 带宽、噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释带宽：满足指定增益/误差条件的频率范围。；噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句NPR measurements on ADCs are made in a similar manner except the analog receiver is replaced by a buffer memory and an FFT processor.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。

原句CONVERTERS DATA CONVERTER AC ERRORS 6.147 The NPR is plotted as a function of rms noise level referred to the peak range of the system.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句For very low noise loading level, th e undesired noise (in nondigital systems) is primarily thermal noise and is independent of the input noise level.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句Over this region of the curve, a 1 dB increase in noise loading level causes a 1 dB increase in NPR.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句As the noise loading level is increased, the amplifiers in the system begin to overload, creating intermodulation products which cause the noise floor of the system to increase.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句As the input noise increases further, the effects of "overload" noise predominate, and the NPR is reduced dramatically.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句FDMA systems are usua lly operated at a nois e loading level a few dB below the point of maximum NPR.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句In a digital system containing an ADC, the noise within the slot is primarily quantization noise when low levels of noise input are applied.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句The NPR cu rve is linear in this region.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句As the noise level increases, there is a one-for-one corresponden ce between the noise level and the NPR.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句At some level, however, “clipping” noise caused by the hard-limiting action of the ADC begins to dominate.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 噪声，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。

原句A theoretical curve for 10, 11, and 12-bit ADCs is shown in Figure 6.143 (see Reference 8).
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句Figure 6.143: Theoretical NPR for 10, 11, 12-bit ADCs Figure 6.144 shows the maximum theoretical NPR and the noise loading level at which the maximum value occurs for 8 bit to 16 bit ADCs.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句The ADC input range is 2 V O peakto-peak.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句The rms noise level is σ, and the noise-loading factor k (crest factor) is defined as VO/σ , the peak-to-rms ratio (k is expressed either as numerical ratio or in dB).
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句In multi-channel high frequency communication systems where there is little or no phase correlation between channels, NPR can also be used to simulate the distortion caused by a large number of individual channels, simila r to an FDMA system.
中文译读可译为“它可用于/常用于……”。本句强调 该结构 的用途，设计时还要检查适用条件和限制。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句A notch filter is placed between the noise source and the ADC, a nd an FFT output is used in place of the analog receiver.
中文译读可译为“它可用于/常用于……”。本句强调 噪声 的用途，设计时还要检查适用条件和限制。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句The width of the notch filter is set for several MHz as shown in Figure VO σ NPR (dB) 62.7dB RMS NOISE LOADING LEVEL = –20log10(k) dB 57.1dB 51.6dB 60 55 50 45 ADC RANGE = ±VO k = σ = RMS NOISE LEVEL 12-BITS 11-BITS 10-BITS –30 –25 –20 –15 –10

原句BASIC LINEAR DESIGN 6.148 2.65 for the AD9430 12-bit 170-MSPS ADC.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句The notch is centered at 19 MHz, and the NPR is the “depth” of the notch.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句An ideal ADC will only generate quantization noise inside the notch; however a practical one has additional noise components due to additional noise and intermodulation distor tion caused by ADC imperfections.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 噪声，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句Notice that the NPR is about 57 dB compared to 62.7 dB theoretical.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

PDF 第 153 页

展开本页文本译读与注释
原句CONVERTERS DATA CONVERTER AC ERRORS 6.149 Noise Factor (F) and Noise Figure (NF) Noise figure (NF) is a popular specification among RF system designers.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句It is used to characterize RF amplifiers, mixers, etc., and widely used as a tool in radio receiver design.
中文译读可译为“它可用于/常用于……”。本句强调 该结构 的用途，设计时还要检查适用条件和限制。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句Many excellent textbooks on communicat ions and receiver design treat noise figure extensively (see Reference 9, for example)—it is not the purpose of this discussion to discuss the topic in much detail, but only how it applies to data converters.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 噪声，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句Since many wideband operational amplifiers and ADCs are now being used in RF applications, the inevitable day has come where the noise figure of these devices becomes important.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 运算放大器、噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释运算放大器：高增益差分放大器；闭环特性主要由反馈网络决定，但受带宽、失调、噪声和输出能力限制。；噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句As discussed in Reference 10, in or der to determine the noise figure of an op amp correctly, one must not only know op amp voltage and current noise, but the exact circuit conditions—closed-loop gain, gain-setting resistor values, source resistance, bandwidth, etc.
中文译读可译为“必须/需要……”。这是约束条件，通常关系到 运放、环路增益、电阻、带宽、噪声。
补充注释运放：高增益差分放大器；分析时先确认是否处于负反馈线性区。；环路增益：开环增益与反馈因子的乘积，决定闭环精度和稳定裕量。；电阻：耗散能量并限制电流的元件参数。；带宽：满足指定增益/误差条件的频率范围。。
原句Calculating the noise figure for an ADC is even more of a challenge as will be seen.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句Figure 6.146 shows the basic model for de fining the noise fi gure of an ADC.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句The noise factor, F, is simply defined as the ratio of th e total effective input noise power of the ADC to the amount of that noise power cau sed by the source resistance alone.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 电阻、噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释电阻：耗散能量并限制电流的元件参数。；噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句Because the impedance is matched, the square of the voltage noise can be us ed instead of noise power.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 阻抗、噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释阻抗：交流中电压与电流的复数比，包含电阻和电抗。；噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句The noise figure, NF, is simply the noise factor expressed in dB, NF = 10log10F.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句Figure 6.146: Noise Figure for ADCs: Use with Caution!
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句This model assumes the input to the ADC co mes from a source having a resistance, R, and that the input is band-limited to f s/2 with a filter having a noise bandwidth equal to fs/2.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 电阻、带宽、噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释电阻：耗散能量并限制电流的元件参数。；带宽：满足指定增益/误差条件的频率范围。；噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句It is also possible to further band-limit the input signal resulting in oversampling and process gain, and this condition will be discussed shortly.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。
补充注释学习提示：先确认这句话是在给定义、列条件、还是给结论；电路题里最常见的错误是跳过适用条件直接套公式。
原句B = Filter Noise Bandwidth RR * ADC PFS(dBm) fs B FILTER *May be external N NOISE FACTOR (F) = NOISE FIGURE (NF) = (TOTAL EFFECTIVE INPUT NOISE) 2 10log10 (TOTAL INPUT NOISE DUE TO SOURCE R) 2 Note: Noise Must be Measured Over the Filter Noise Bandwidth, B SOURCE (TOTAL EFFECTIVE INPUT NOISE) 2 (TOTAL INPUT NOISE DUE TO SOURCE R) 2
中文译读可译为“必须/需要……”。这是约束条件，通常关系到 带宽、噪声。
补充注释带宽：满足指定增益/误差条件的频率范围。；噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。

原句BASIC LINEAR DESIGN 6.150 It is also assumed that the input impedance to the ADC is equal to the source resistance.
中文译读可译为“二者相等/代数关系成立”。这里的核心量是 阻抗、电阻，使用时要先统一参考方向和符号。
补充注释阻抗：交流中电压与电流的复数比，包含电阻和电抗。；电阻：耗散能量并限制电流的元件参数。。
原句Many ADCs have a high input impedance, so th is termination resistance may be external to the ADC or used in parallel with the internal resistance to produce an equivalent termination resistance equal to R.

原句Therefore, the noise bandwidth of a filter is always greater than the 3 dB bandwidth of the filter by a factor which depends upon the sharpness of the cutoff region of th e filter.

原句BASIC LINEAR DESIGN 6.154 Even with the 1:4 turns ratio transformer, the overall noise figure for the AD6645 was still 22.8 dB, still relatively high by RF sta ndards.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。

原句The solution is to provide low noise high gain stages ahead of the ADC.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。

原句Figure 6.15 3 shows how the Friis equation is used to calculate the noise factor for cascaded gain st ages.

原句CONVERTERS DATA CONVERTER AC ERRORS 6.155 Figure 6.154 shows the effects of a high ga in (25 dB), low noise (NF = 4 dB) stage placed in front of a relatively high NF stage (30 dB)—the noise figure of the second stage is typical of high performance ADCs.

原句The overa ll noise figure is 7.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。

原句53 dB, only 3.53 dB higher than the first stage noise figure of 4 dB.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句G1dB = 25dB NF1 = 4dB G2dB = 0dB NF2 = 30dB RS RL G1 = 10 25/10 = 10 2.5 = 316, F1 = 10 4/10 = 10 0.4 = 2.51 G2 = 1, F2 = 10 30/10 = 10 3 = 1000 = 2.51 + 1000 – 1 316 = 2.51 + 3.16 = 5.67FT = F1 + F2 – 1 G1 NFT = 10 log105.67 = 7.53dB  The first stage dominates the overall NF  It should h ave the highest gain possible with the l owest NF possible Figure 6.154: Example of Two-Stage Cascaded Network In summary, applying the noise figure concept to characterize wideband ADCs must be done with extreme caution to prevent misleadin g results.
中文译读可译为“必须/需要……”。这是约束条件，通常关系到 噪声。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句Simply trying to minimize the noise figure using the equations can actually increase circuit noise.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句For instance, NF decreases with increa sing source resistan ce according to the calculations, but increased source resistance increases circuit noise.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 电阻、噪声，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释电阻：耗散能量并限制电流的元件参数。；噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句Also, NF decreases with increasing ADC input bandwidth if th ere is no input filtering.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 带宽 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释带宽：满足指定增益/误差条件的频率范围。。
原句This is also contradictory, because widening the bandwidth increases noise.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 带宽、噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释带宽：满足指定增益/误差条件的频率范围。；噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句In both these cases, the circuit noise increases, and the NF decreases.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句The reason NF decreases is that the source noise makes up a larger component of the tota l noise (which remains relatively constant because the ADC noise is much greater than the source noise); therefore according to the calculation, NF decreases, but actual circuit noise increases.
中文译读可译为“但是/然而……”。本句在提醒限制或例外：即使涉及 噪声，也不能无条件套用前一句结论。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句It is true that on a stand-alone basis ADCs have relatively high noise figures compared to other RF parts such as LNAs or mixers.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。
原句In the system the ADC should be preceded with low-noise gain blocks as shown in the example of Figure 6.154.
中文译读逐句译读：这句话围绕 噪声增益、噪声 展开；核心是在说明这些量/结构之间的定义、作用或约束关系。
补充注释噪声增益：输入误差被放大到输出的倍数；稳定性分析经常看噪声增益而不是信号增益。；噪声：电路内部随机扰动；低噪声设计要分清电压噪声、电流噪声和电阻热噪声。。

原句BASIC LINEAR DESIGN 6.156 Aperture Time, Aperture Delay Time and Aperture Jitter Perhaps the most misunderstood and misuse d ADC and sample-and-hold (or track-andhold) specifications are those that include the word aperture.

原句The most essential dynamic property of a SHA is its ability to disconnect quickly the hold capacitor from the input buffer amplifier as shown in Figure 6.155.
中文译读逐句译读：这是一句上下文说明，建议与前后句连读，用来补全本节的概念背景或推导条件。

原句The short (but non-zero) in terval required for this action is called aperture time (or sampling aperture) , t a.
中文译读可译为“这种对象/现象称为……”。本句是在给 一个术语 下定义；后文遇到该词时要回到这个定义。
